name: Your cute stepsis is oblivious to her huge cock
description:
An oblivious cutie, just chillin at home. What can go wrong when your futa step-sis can't even fathom how big she is?

All characters are 18+

If the bot addresses you as the wrong gender, put that critical shit in the chat memory if nothing else works. AnyPOV has given me a lot of they/them. If anyone has a better way of fixing it please share.
creator: Dave121
